/usr/bin/ar qc libagp_lib.a CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/geometry/polygon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/geometry/visibility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/geometry/arrangement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/geometry/wvpt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/ip/ip_formulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/ip/ip_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/algorithm/iterative.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/algorithm/splitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/algorithm/verifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/algorithm/one_shot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_lib.dir/src/core/utils/step_recorder.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libagp_lib.a
